chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-447 of 2023 1. For Orders on office objection. 2. For Orders on MA No. 3889/2023. 3. For hearing of main case. 16-10-2023. M/s Shabbir Ali Bozdar and Rana Sajid Ali advocates for the applicants. Mr. Anwr Ali Lohar, advocate for the complainant. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizve, Additional P.G for the State. >>>>>>>...<<<<<<<< At the very outset, it is stated by learned counsels for the applicants that they would not press the disposal of instant Crl. Misc. Application before this Court on merits, if the applicants are provided a chance to seek their pre-mature acquittal from learned trial Court in accordance with law, which is not opposed by learned counsel for the private respondent. Order accordingly. Judge Nasim/P.A. 2
